name: Lycanthropy
rules_text: H:3 A:0 HP:12 L:1 Player-controlled. Cast on recruit group not in a structure. Recruit group is replaced by an equal number of Wolves. (This does not trigger any death effects.) The new Wolf group is player- controlled, and it executes the group's movement order on the turn it is created. If dispelled, each Wolf is replaced by a new recruit of the original nation and class, with the same amount of damage.
